feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Service Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Service Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to generate Client SSL Certification in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

While configuring communication system in SAP Service Cloud v2, under Outbound section, we have option to select Authentication Method as Client SSL Certificate.

Can someone let me know if this Client SSL Certificate needs to be generated in Service Cloud v2 or is generated by CPI Team or other team and shared with with Service Cloud v2 Team.

 

If SSL Certificate needs to be generated in Service Cloud v2, kindly help me with the steps to generate it.

 

Thank you in advance.

 

Regards,

Syed Muheed

entry.title: How to test a Nodejs application using approuter from postman ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts',

We are trying to implement a scenario using webhooks from SAP Service Cloud V2 to SAP BTP. I have already created an application using nodejs and axios api to trigger an event or action in sap v2 once event is received in BTP.

This works fine. No issue in the connection.

(please note: BTP application here refers to just handling of logic. I don't need to created any UI to have interaction for the nodejs btp application. It is just to handle some complex logic.)

But problem is the BTP application is being called from V2 without any authentication. I am able to call the same from postman as well it works fine.

Now I have implemented approuter using xsuaa service. The approuter is created and now when I try to access the webhook using approuter it is not working.

Checking through all the blogs, I am unable to identify the correct method of Authentication.

Question and doubts I have:

How can I authenticate the application (as it is not required to have any roles or scopes)

Do i still need to define the scopes and roles in xs-app.json?

Why scopes and roles are needed. I want to authenticate it using just some authentication method. Roles and scopes should be important only when user interaction is involved.

Is there a way, I can setup a simple authentication using a BTP user ?

I am attaching screenshots of important files.

SAP Service Cloud , SAP Sales Cloud , 

@Kinsbrunner

entry.title: 2408 release- C4C screen to open when triggered from a Mashup in any other NGAP screen
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the 2408 release, a new feature has been introduced that allows the C4C screen to open when triggered from a Mashup in any other NGAP screen. Has anyone had experience with implementing this?

Thanks

Shuva

entry.title: I am trying to set a workflow rule to send email when the "Assigned To" field on ticket is blank.
entry.content: I am trying to set a workflow rule to send email when the "Assigned To" field on ticket is blank. In other words how does the query Unassigned tickets work. I tried to set condition with "Not Assigned", "Is Initial", "#" etc but none work.

entry.title: Role Layout in SAP Sales Service Cloud V2 is supported?
entry.content:
Hi Cx community,

Is it possible to customize Roles Layout in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2?. I'm refering to funtions in next screen in V1:

I have looked for this feature in documentation, however haven´t find it for v2.

Thanks in advanced,

Niko

entry.title: Is there a feed feature in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2?
entry.content:
Hi Cx Community,

One of most loved and practice feature in SAP Sales Service cloud "v1" is the ability to have, an open or a private, communication between users in any master data or process by using Feed funcionlity. Is there a similar one in SAP Sales Service Cloud v2? Next some screens from "v1"

entry.title: Is it possible to maintain more than 4 characters while configuring Code List in SAP Service Cloudv2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When we try to enter more than 4 characters while configuring code list in SAP Service Cloud v2, we are receiving below error message.

"Code cannot exceed more than 4 characters"

Is it possible to increase the character limit in code?

If possible, what is the setting that we need to do.

 

Regards,

Syed Muheed

entry.title: What is the file storage limit per user for Sales and Service Cloud V2? If the limit is exceeded, ho
entry.content: What is the file storage limit per user or tenant for Sales and Service Cloud V2? If the limit is exceeded, how should the files be backed up?

entry.title: How to update a boolean field type using determination in Service Cloud version 2?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a custom field of the type boolean for our requirement. Now the requirement is the boolean field type should automatically get updated when certain condition is fulfilled. I am using Determinations in Extensibility in Service Cloud V2 for the update. However I am not able to get proper syntax for the field assignment in order to update the value automatically?

I am attaching a screenshot of my Assignment.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Service Cloud: Possible to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate?
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I want to convert a characteristic into a key figure in order to calculate with it. Is this possible or not?

My business scenario is: I want to check wheater the SLA of a ticket is fulfilled or not. Therefore I want to subtract the fields 'Initial Review due' with 'Initial Review completed'. If it is a positive value, it was fulfilled. If it is a negative value, it was not fulfilled (show it in red, if possible).

I currently dont see an option to convert the characteristic into key figure in order to calculate. 

But hopefully, I am wrong... 
Can anybody help?

Best reagds,
Deborah

#C4C #servicecloud #report # reporting #calculate #characteristic #keyfigure

entry.title: Email Received date in Ticket Report
entry.content:
For scenarios, where ticket is getting created automatically from Incoming emails via various channels, there is a requirement to calculate SLA how long it took to create the ticket for Unassociated Emails by the agents. 

For this purpose, we need

Email Received Date in ticket to do the comparison with first response date.

Time between the email received and first response date need to be calculated.

Currently Ticket Interactions Report has activity reported on field exposed. and the 'Reported On' Date in the report displays incorrect data for some of the tickets.

Request to provide any insights if anyone has worked on similar scenario.

Regards, Abdul Rasheed

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - Utilities add on - How to create a Premise
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to create a premise via SAP Service cloud - Utilities Add on. When i go to Premise i don´t have the option to create a new premise.

Can i create a premise via Service cloud?

Thanks,

Rita

entry.title: 3rd party application integration with SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We are trying to integrate a third-party application to SAP Service Cloud V2. Our requirement is to Integrate the application and embed its screen. We require this embedded screen to be always accessible similar to productivity tools (CTI Widget, Built-In Support, Notifications etc) that are always available irrespective of which screen we are in.

We tried different routes like Mashup, separate tab etc but those are not feasible as those will be available only when we will we select them. Our requirement is to keep the embedded screen always available. Any pointers with regards to this will be really appreciated.

Best Regards,

Imran

entry.title: C4C: Adding Additional Filters for Archiving Search
entry.content:
Hi - is there a way to add additional search criteria, like Customer ID when searching archived data via Admin > Archiving > Search functionality?

Currently, we can only search below, but I need to specifically search archived data of a customer

Thanks in advance!

Cheers,.

Marc

entry.title: Updating Extension Field with External Hook in SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on updating an extension field called zWebSite in SAP, where I want to store the website obtained from the Organizational Unit entity using ExtenalHook PreHook. To achieve this, I developed a small application in SAP BTP. However, I am encountering an issue with the following error:

Custom logic error: FAILED_PRECONDITION: Error raised from the external system with HTTP Status Code: 500 "Request failed with status code 422".

My code(JS):

I am wondering about the correct structure for the update. Specifically, I would like to know:

Is it necessary to send the entire currentImage data in the update request, or is it sufficient to only send the extension field zWebSite?

I appreciate any help or suggestions you can provide.

Thank you!

entry.title: Outbound SMS / WhatsApp Message from SAP Service Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on a business requirement which requires outbound SMS or WhatsApp to be sent to the customer based on his service ticket status change in SAP Service cloud.

We are evaluating integration with Bird and Twilio, from the online documentation and blogs I could find that there is No out of box integration of Bird with SAP service cloud.

If anyone has done integration of SAP service cloud with Twilio could they please share their experience and  some information on - if out of box integration is possible or we have to go via customization only ?

And if customization - what steps did you take to integrate with Twilio or Bird.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Kapil Kumar

SAP Customer Experience Foundation  SAP Service Cloud SAP Sales Cloud

entry.title: Re: How to create a relative selection for Task Approver...
entry.content:
Hello,

as you might know the Data Source "Approval Task Details" only draws results if it is joined with an application created data source as an anchor. More about this in the following KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/0002599498

Your requirement to create a relative selection for the field "Task Approver" can be achieved by joining the "Employee Master Data" Data Source as well. 

In the attached example, the application created Data Source "Ticket" is joined with the "Approval Task Details" Data Source based on the attributes "Ticket" and "Business Document UUID". The "Approval Task Details" Data Source is joined with the "Employee Master Data" Data Source based on the attributes "Task Approver" and "User". 

Finally, in the Report you build on top of this joined Data Source, use the "Employee" attribute from the "Employee Master Data" Data Source for your relative selection. You might want to consider renaming it so it is easier to identify.

Kind regards,

Konstantin

entry.title: Capturing Survey Response in C4C
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to capture survey responses in C4C that will be sent from a third-party system. I’ve reviewed the OData documentation, which states that we can’t create survey responses via the API. Is there an alternative approach we can consider to achieve this?

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud Workflow field update use string in the formula
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I want to concatenate two strings with a workflow in SAP Service Cloud (V1), workflow type field update.
Is it possible to have a blank space between it? 
I tried with " or ' but it is not working, it is showing a syntax error... 

Does somebody have a tip?

Thanks a lot!

Deborah

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud - Certification Question for HR Services (Ask HR) implementation
entry.content:
We will be needing to certify to implement HR Service Centre for one of our customers. The learning journey offers 2 certifications for this, one general one and one for v2. This is a new implementation. We do not know which certification we should take. Can you help? 

I find in general there is very little documentation around for this. 

Thanks very much for your help,

 

Dana
